name: Yaksamon

signature_move.name: Ittouryoudan
signature_move.description: 12Fires a shock wave by crossing its twobokutō.Merges its twobokutōinto a single longer, glowing blade, and attacks with it.

description: An Armor-level Demon Man Digimon that evolved through the power of the " Digimental of Purity ". It exhibits power like a fierce god, and although its offensive power is tremendous, it has a side that protects the weak with its strong sense of devotion, righteousness, and respect . Also, it excels in the secret arts, and is capable of mastering any supernatural power. It is very taciturn and has a calm, cool, and collected personality. Its Special Moves are a shock wave fired by crossing its two bokutō ( Ittouryoudan ), and manipulating the opponent like a puppet with a bewitching look ( Kugutsu no Jutsu ).
